ddls:
CREATE TABLE "garment_types" (
  "garment_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each garment type */,
  "garment_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the garment type (e.g., Pants, Shirts) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the garment type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the garment type (e.g., casual, formal, sportswear) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender the garment type is designed for (e.g., Men, Women, Unisex) */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of a representative image for the garment type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("garment_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart entry */,
  "garment_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the garment type the size chart belongs to */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the garment (e.g., 24, 25, 26) */,
  "waist" TEXT /* Waist measurement for the size */,
  "hip" TEXT /* Hip measurement for the size */,
  "thigh" TEXT /* Thigh measurement for the size */,
  "rise" TEXT /* Rise measurement for the size */,
  "bottom_leg" TEXT /* Bottom leg measurement for the size */,
  "country_standard" TEXT /* International sizing standard (e.g., US, EU, UK) */,
  "chest" TEXT /* Chest measurement for the size */,
  "shoulder" TEXT /* Shoulder measurement for the size */,
  "sleeve_length" TEXT /* Sleeve length measurement for the size */,
  "length" TEXT /* Overall length measurement for the size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_garment_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("garment_type_id") REFERENCES garment_types ("garment_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, admin) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for contact purposes */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user for shipping and billing */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user profile */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the profile belongs to */,
  "waist_preference" TEXT /* Preferred waist measurement */,
  "hip_preference" TEXT /* Preferred hip measurement */,
  "thigh_preference" TEXT /* Preferred thigh measurement */,
  "rise_preference" TEXT /* Preferred rise measurement */,
  "bottom_leg_preference" TEXT /* Preferred bottom leg measurement */,
  "chest_preference" TEXT /* Preferred chest measurement */,
  "shoulder_preference" TEXT /* Preferred shoulder measurement */,
  "sleeve_length_preference" TEXT /* Preferred sleeve length measurement */,
  "length_preference" TEXT /* Preferred overall length measurement */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user profile was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user profile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user interaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user interacting with the size guide */,
  "garment_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the garment type the user is interested in */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size the user is viewing or trying on */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., view, try-on) */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for the interaction (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user during the interaction */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the interaction in seconds */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the interaction was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_garment_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("garment_type_id") REFERENCES garment_types ("garment_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "garment_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each garment image */,
  "garment_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the garment type the image belongs to */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the garment in the image */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path to the garment image */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "thumbnail_url" TEXT /* URL of a thumbnail image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the image was uploaded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_garment_images_garment_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("garment_type_id") REFERENCES garment_types ("garment_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the preference belongs to */,
  "garment_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the garment type the preference is for */,
  "preferred_size" TEXT /* Preferred size for the garment type */,
  "country_standard" TEXT /* International sizing standard for the preferred size */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size preference was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the size preference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_preferences_garment_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("garment_type_id") REFERENCES garment_types ("garment_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
